"Cortana, all I need to know is did we lose them?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"I think we both know the answer to that." - Cortana
"We made a blind jump. How did they—" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Get here first? The Covenant ships have always been faster. As for tracking us all the way from Reach...at light speed, my maneuvering options were limited." - Cortana
"We were running dark, yes?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Until we decelerated. No one could have missed the hole we tore in subspace." - Cortana
"They were waiting for us on the far side of the planet." - Cortana
"So, where do we stand?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Our fighters are mopping up the last of their recon picket now, nothing serious." - Cortana
"But I've isolated approach signatures from multiple CCS-class battle groups, make it three capital ships per group. And in about 90 seconds they'll be all over us." - Cortana
"Well, that's it then. Bring the ship back up to Combat Alert Alpha. I want everyone at their stations." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Everyone, sir?" - Cortana
"Everyone." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"And Cortana..." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Hmm?" - Cortana
"...let's give our old friends a warm welcome." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"I've already begun." - Cortana
"Attention, all combat personnel: Please report to your action stations." - Cortana
"5th Platoon, secure airlocks on Deck 11. 14th Platoon, rendezvous with 22nd Tactical at bulkhead Charlie 14." - Cortana
"You heard the lady! Move like you've got a purpose!" - Johnson
"This is not a drill. I repeat, this is not a drill." - Cortana
"Men...keep your eyes down range, fingers on your triggers, and we all go home in one piece. Am I right, Marines?" - Johnson

"Once again, it is our job to finish what the flyboys started. We are leaving this ship, platoon, and engaging the Covenant on solid ground. When we meet the enemy, we will rip their skulls from their spines, and toss 'em away, laughin'! Am I right, Marines?" - Johnson

"Men, here is where we show those split-chin squid-head sons-of-bitches that they could not have picked a worse enemy than the human race! We are going to blow the hell out of those dumb bugs, until we don't have anything left to shoot 'em with! And then we are going to strangle them with their own-living-guts! Am I right, Marines?" - Johnson

"Men, we led those dumb bugs out to the middle of nowhere to keep 'em from gettin' their filthy claws on Earth, but we stumbled onto somethin' they're so hot for that they're scramblin' over each other to get it. Well, I don't care if it's God's own anti-son-of-a-bitch machine or a giant hula hoop, we're not gonna let 'em have it! What we will let 'em have...is a belly full of lead and a pool of their own blood to drown in! Am I right, Marines?" - Johnson
"Sir, yes sir!" - Marines
"Uh-huh. Damn right, I am. Now move it out! Double time!" - Johnson
"Attention, all personnel: We are re-engaging the enemy. Internal and external contact imminent." - Cortana
"All you greenhorns who wanted to see Covenant up close...this is gonna be your lucky day." - Johnson
"Whoa! Sir?" - Sam Marcus
"Right. Let's thaw him out." - Thom Shephard
"Okay. Bringing low-level systems online. Cracking the case in thirty seconds." - Sam Marcus
"He's hot! Blowing the pins in five..." - Sam Marcus
"His tube shows green. Cycle complete." - Sam Marcus
"Sorry for the quick thaw, Master Chief. Things are a little hectic right now. The disorientation should pass quickly." - Thom Shephard
"Welcome back, sir. We'll have you battle ready stat." - Sam Marcus
"Chief, please look around the room. I need to get a calibration reading for your battle suit's diagnostics." - Thom Shephard
"Good. Thank you sir." - Thom Shephard
"I'm bringing your health monitors online, sir." - Sam Marcus
"Vital signs look normal. No freezer burn. Okay sir, go ahead and climb out of the cryo tube." - Thom Shephard
"I gave you a double dose of the wake-up stim. Take a quick walk around the cryo bay and join me at the optical diagnostics station when you're ready." - Thom Shephard
"Stand on the red square please." - Thom Shephard
"Ok sir, look at me to begin." - Thom Shephard

"I know the ordnance techs usually take care of your targeting sensors, but we're short of time, Chief. Just look at each of the flashing panels to target them. When you lock on, it'll change color." - Thom Shephard
"Okay, that looks good..." - Thom Shephard
"Sir, I'm getting some calibration errors. I'm going to invert your looking pitch, so you can see if you like it better that way." - Sam Marcus
"Try targeting the flashing lights again." - Sam Marcus
"Is that better or should I switch it back?" - Sam Marcus
"OK, I'll leave the pitch normal/inverted. But if you want, you can change it yourself later. I'm ready for the energy shield test now." - Sam Marcus
"Please follow me to the energy shield test station." - Thom Shephard
"Fire teams: Report to defensive positions Alpha through Sierra. Sensors show inbound Covenant boarding craft. Stand by to repel boarders." - Cortana
"Warning! Covenant incursions on port decks Three and Nine. Alpha Team, engage enemy boarders." - Cortana
"Enemy boarding parties on starboard decks Eight through Ten. Echo Team, intercept Covenant forces." - Cortana
"Covenant boarding craft detected on port decks Four, Five, Seven, Eight, and Eleven. All available Combat Teams, respond!" - Cortana
"Baker Team reports Covenant forces engaged on port deck Seven. Security teams, move to assist." - Cortana
"Warning! Covenant boarders on starboard decks Four and Six. Sierra Team reports heavy resistance! Security teams, assist." - Cortana
"Alert! Alpha and Charlie Teams report heavy fighting on port decks Five through Nine. Foxtrot Team, move to starboard decks Eight and Ten, and stand by." - Cortana
"Reserve Combat Teams Tango through X-Ray to port decks Five and Six, on the double!" - Cortana
"Reserve Combat Teams Oscar and Romeo to port decks Nine through Eleven." - Cortana
"Sir, I need you to look at me to begin." - Thom Shephard
"Stand on the yellow square. This'll just take a second." - Thom Shephard
"Okay, bring his energy shields online please." - Thom Shephard
"Alright. Shields read as fully charged." - Sam Marcus
"Okay, sir. Bring them down to test the automatic recharge." - Thom Shephard
"Recharging normal. Showing green across the board." - Sam Marcus
"Bridge to Cryo Two, this is Captain Keyes. Send the Master Chief to the bridge immediately." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Captain, we'll have to skip the weapons diagnostics and I-" - Thom Shephard
"On the double, crewman." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Aye aye, sir. The skipper seems jumpy, we'd better get moving. We'll find you weapons later." - Thom Shephard
"Okay. I'll leave the self-diagnostics running, at least." - Sam Marcus
"Good idea. You'd better get to your evac group, Sam!" - Thom Shephard
"Affirmative. Just have to reset the computer and I'm outta here!" - Sam Marcus
"Oh God! They're trying to get through the door!" - Sam Marcus
"Security! Intruders in Cryo Two! No, please don't— Agh!" - Sam Marcus
"Sam! Sam! C'mon, we've got to get the hell out of here!" - Thom Shephard
"This way!" - Thom Shephard
"Behind us! They're right behind us!" - Crewman #1
"Secure those blast doors! Move! Move!" - Crewman #2 or Marine
"Wait for me!" - Crewman #3
"Master Chief, sir, the situation's secure here. You're probably needed somewhere else!" - Crewman
"Chief, Cortana says get to the bridge, double quick!" - Marine #1
"Sir! The Captain needs you on the bridge, ASAP! You better follow me." - Chips Dubbo
"Get clear, Chief!" - Chips Dubbo
"Captain Keyes is waiting for you, sir!" - Chips Dubbo
"Captain Keyes." - John-117
"Good to see you, Master Chief. Things aren't going well. Cortana did her best, but we never really had a chance." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"A dozen Covenant superior battleships against a single Halcyon-class cruiser. With those odds, I'm content with three - make that four kills. Sleep well?" - Cortana
"No thanks to your driving, yes." - John-117
"So you did miss me." - Cortana
"Report!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"It must have been one of their boarding parties! I'd guess an antimatter charge!" - Cortana
"Ma'am! Fire control to the main cannon is offline!" - Fire Control Officer
"Captain, the cannon was my last offensive option." - Cortana
"Alright then. I'm initiating Cole Protocol, Article 2. We're abandoning the Autumn. That means you too, Cortana." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"While you do what, go down with the ship?" - Cortana
"In a manner of speaking. The object we found, I'm going to try and land the Autumn on it." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"With all due respect, sir, this war has enough dead heroes." - Cortana

"I appreciate your concern, Cortana, but it's not up to me. Protocol is clear. Destruction or capture of a shipboard AI is absolutely unacceptable, that means you're leaving the ship. Lock in a selection of emergency landing zones, upload them to my neural lace, and then sort yourself for a hard transfer." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Aye aye, sir." - Cortana

"...which is where you come in, Chief. Get Cortana off this ship. Keep her safe from the enemy. If they capture her, they'll learn everything. Force deployment, weapons research...Earth." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"I understand." - John-117
"The Autumn will continue evasive maneuvers until you initiate a landing sequence. Not that you'll listen, but I'd suggest letting my subroutines handle the final approach." - Cortana
"Excellent work, Cortana. Thank you. Are you ready?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Yank me." - Cortana
"Good luck, Master Chief." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Hmm...your architecture isn't much different from the Autumn's..." - Cortana
"Don't get any funny ideas." - John-117
"I don't keep it loaded, son. You'll have to find ammo as you go." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Get moving, Master Chief. There's nothing you can do here." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"I gave you an order, soldier. Get off this ship!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"We need to get off this ship, Chief, before we're completely overrun by Covenant." - Cortana
"What the hell are you doing?!" - Cortana
"Security to the bridge, the Master Chief has gone rampant! Take him down, boys!" - Cortana
"Combat Teams on decks Seven and Eight, fall back to secondary defensive positions." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Reserve Combat Teams on decks Five through Nine, fall back to secondary defensive positions!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Crew and Ops personnel on decks One through Four, report to evac stations immediately!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Ops personnel on decks Nine through Twelve, report to evac stations now!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"All hands, this is the Captain. Prepare to abandon ship! Combat Teams, repel boarders until Ops personnel are away. Good luck. Keyes out." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"All remaining crew and Ops personnel, hit the lifeboats! Fall back to evac stations." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Combat teams Alpha through November, pull out to nearest evac station!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Combat Teams Sierra through Victor, prepare for evac!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"All combat personnel, fall back to tertiary defensive positions!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Those Marines could use some help, Chief! Do what you do best!" - Cortana
"Keep your head down! There's two of us in here now, remember?" - Cortana
"What the hell? Did something just hit us?" - Marine #2
"Move it! Back to the airlock!" - Marine #3
"They're using our lifeboat airlocks to attach their boarding craft! We go out and they come in! Clever bastards..." - Cortana
"Go on ahead, Chief. We'll secure this airlock." - Marine #3
"We're taking fire. We could use a hand!" - Marine #4
"Covenant! On the landing above us!" - Cortana
"The lifepods are launching! We should hurry." - Cortana
"The Covenant are destroying the lifepods...they really don't want us on that ring." - Cortana
"Warning! Blast doors closing! We'll have to use the ship's maintenance access ways. Follow the NAV point, it will lead you to an opening." - Cortana
"I'm detecting Covenant movement outside the access ways. Activating motion tracker. Let's find a safe exit." - Cortana
"They're right on top of us! We need to find another way through." - Cortana
"We're too close! We need to find another route." - Cortana
"Motion tracker shows all clear." - Cortana

"Wait. We need to get through that door, but it's been damaged by an explosion. Analyzing... The door's control mechanism is offline, but it's taken a lot of damage. You should be able to bash it open with the butt of your weapon." - Cortana
"It looks like the Covenant wanted to catch you napping." - Cortana
"The damage to the superstructure is extensive... I don't know how much more abuse the Autumn can take." - Cortana
"There's one last lifeboat! Quickly, get aboard before it launches!" - Cortana
"Oh no, oh no!" - Marine #5
"Now would be a very good time to leave!" - Cortana
"Punch it." - John-117
"Aye aye, sir!" - Bumblebee Pilot
"We're disengaged. Goin' for minimum safe distance." - Bumblebee Pilot
"We're gonna make it, aren't we, sir? I don't wanna die out here!" - Marine #6
"Look!" - Cortana
"What is that thing, Lieutenant?" - Marine #6
"Hell if I know, but we're landin' on it!" - Bumblebee Pilot
"The Autumn! She's been hit!" - Marine #5
"I knew it! The Autumn's accelerating. Keyes is going in manually!" - Cortana
"Heads up, everyone, this is it! We're entering the ring's atmosphere in five!" - Bumblebee Pilot
"Sure you wouldn't rather take a seat?" - Cortana
"We'll be fine." - John-117
"If I still had fingers, they'd be crossed..." - Cortana
"We're coming in too fast!" - Cortana
"Damn! Air brake failure! They blew too early! I'm losin' her. Brace for impact!" - Bumblebee Pilot
"Chief? Chief! Can you hear me? At last! Are you alright? Can you move?" - Cortana
"The others...the impact. There's nothing we can do." - Cortana
"I'm reading thousands of types of flora. The ring's ecosystem is incredibly sophisticated." - Cortana

"Warning! I've detected multiple Covenant drop ships on approach. I recommend moving into those hills. If we're lucky, the Covenant will believe that everyone aboard this lifeboat died in the crash." - Cortana
"Alert! Covenant Dropship inbound! They must be looking for survivors. I recommend immediate evasion!" - Cortana
"Alert! Covenant dropship has detected us, here they come." - Cortana
"I'm reading a lifeboat beacon over the next hill. We should check to see if there are any survivors." - Cortana
"Good to see you, sir! Welcome to the party!" - Private Bisenti
"Good to see you, sir! I thought we were the only ones to make it off of the Pillar of Autumn!" - Private Bisenti
"Thank God you're here, Master Chief. I thought we were in real trouble." - Private Bisenti
"It's a mess, sir. We're scattered all over this valley. We called for evac, but until you showed up, I thought we were cooked." - Avery Johnson
"Don't worry, Sergeant. We'll stay here until evac arrives." - Cortana
"Heads up! I got a Covenant dropship headin' in, over here!" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Look sharp! Covenant dropship on approach! I could use some help over here!" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Uh-oh, another bandit droppin' in behind us! They're tryin' to flank us!" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"We couldn't save them... I recommend to stay here and wait for extraction." - Cortana
"Where are you going? The lifeboat beacon is our only chance to getting reunited with the rest of the crew, we need to stay with it." - Cortana
"This is Pelican Echo 419. Anybody read me? Repeat: any UNSC personnel, respond." - Carol Rawley
"Roger, Echo 419. This is Fire Team Charlie. We read you. Is that you, Foehammer?" - Cortana
"Roger, Echo 419. This is Fire Team Charlie. We read you. Is that you, Foehammer?" - Marine
"Roger, Echo 419. This is Fire Team Charlie. We read you, five by five. Is that you, Foehammer?" - Avery Johnson
"Roger, Fire Team Charlie. Good to hear from ya!" - Carol Rawley
"If you're not too busy, Foehammer, we could use a lift. We have survivors to transport to the Command Shuttle." - Avery Johnson
"If you're not too busy, Foehammer, we could use a lift. We have survivors to transport to the Command Shuttle." - Marine
"Foehammer, we need transportation to the Command Shuttle." - Cortana
"I'm on my way." - Carol Rawley

"Look, more lifeboats! They're coming in fast. If those lifeboats make it down, the Covenant are going to be right on top of them. Foehammer, we need you to disengage your Warthog. The Master Chief and I are going to see if we can save some soldiers." - Cortana
"Roger, Cortana. Okay, Charlie Team, Warthog deployed. Saddle up and give 'em hell!" - Carol Rawley
"Roger, Foehammer. Stand by to evac survivors and transport them to safety." - Cortana
"That's affirmative. Echo 419 staying on station. Foehammer out." - Carol Rawley
"The Master Chief and I need some backup, can you spare a few men?" - Cortana
"Sure, Cortana. All right ladies, volunteers step up on the double! The rest of you, get to the dropship." - Avery Johnson
"Sure, Cortana. All right, who's in? Volunteers step up on the double! The rest of you, get to the dropship." - PFC M. Fitzgerald
"We'll need that Warthog if we want to get to the other lifeboats in time." - Cortana
"Survivors would probably stick close to their emergency beacons." - Cortana
"We need to find where each lifeboat has landed." - Cortana
"This cave is not a natural formation. Someone built it, so it must lead somewhere." - Cortana

"I've hacked into the Covenant battlenet. They're actually broadcasting tactical data on unencrypted channels! We should show them who they're dealing with. Master Chief, I'm going to use your suit's transponder system to monitor their chatter." - Cortana
"There must be some mechanism to cross this cavern. Look for a control panel or switch." - Cortana

"New traffic on the Covenant battlenet... a lot more crew made it off the Autumn than I had predicted - the Captain really gave them hell! If we can find Captain Keyes and other survivors, we have a chance to coordinate an effective resistance." - Cortana
"Survivors detected. Marines are concealed in those rocks." - Cortana
"Contact! Covenant drop ship, down there!" - Marine Sharpshooter
"Fall back! Fall back!" - Marine
"Where are you going? We need to stay with the Marines." - Cortana
"Echo 419 to Cortana, come in." - Carol Rawley
"We read you, Echo 419. We have survivors and need immediate dust-off." - Cortana
"Roger, Cortana. On my way. I've spotted additional lifeboats in your area. One near the cliff edge, and another near the head of the river." - Carol Rawley
"One near the rock slide, and another near the head of the river." - Carol Rawley
"One near the rock slide, and another near the cliff edge." - Carol Rawley
"Hard to see from my altitude, but it looks like there are more survivors." - Carol Rawley
"Acknowledged. We're on our way." - Cortana
"No survivors..." - Cortana
"We need to find the other two lifeboats." - Cortana
"There are some Marines, hiding in the hills above the structure." - Cortana
"You're a sight for sore eyes, Chief. We're in a bad way. We've got wounded here." - Marine
"I'll call in a dropship to pick them up." - Cortana
"Echo 419 to Cortana, Foehammer's on station and ready for another pickup." - Carol Rawley
"Affirmative, Foehammer. We're ready for dust off, approach when ready. We're going to look for the last lifeboat, Echo 419, good luck." - Cortana
"They're all dead." - Cortana

"Warning! I've picked up reports that the Covenant have located and secured the Pillar of Autumn's crash site. The good news is the Captain's still alive. The bad news is that the Covenant has captured the entire surviving command crew. Let's hurry and find the final lifeboat, so we can link up with the rest of the survivors." - Cortana
"Lifeboat detected. No sign of survivors..." - Cortana
"This lifeboat is trashed, Chief. There are weapons and supplies but...no bodies." - PFC M. Fitzgerald
"The lifeboat's totaled, sir. There are weapons and supplies everywhere, but I can't find any bodies. Maybe somebody made it out of here alive." - PFC M. Fitzgerald
"What a mess! The weapons lockers must have broken open. There are weapons and supplies all over the place. Where's the bodies, though?" - PFC M. Fitzgerald
"Maybe they took cover in that structure. Let's check it out." - Cortana
"We should search the interior of those structures before we leave." - Cortana
"I've called for evac." - Cortana
"Roger that. Marines! Assemble for evac, pronto!" - Marine
"We weren't able to save any of the Marines. A one hundred percent casualty rate." - Cortana
"Dead. They're all dead. Get to the drop ship and let's get back to base." - Cortana
"We should secure the area before the drop ship arrives." - Cortana
"That's the last of them." - Cortana
"Roger that. I'm on my way." - Carol Rawley

"New traffic on the Covenant battlenet. I've found Captain Keyes! He's being held on a Covenant cruiser, the Truth and Reconciliation, a ship I disabled before we abandoned the Autumn. The Truth and Reconciliation touched down on a desert plateau roughly three hundred kilometers up-spin." - Cortana
"There's our ride. Get aboard, and let's get out of here." - Cortana
"Welcome aboard, Master Chief. Ready for dust-off." - Carol Rawley
"We should move out, Lieutenant. And then we'll need your help on our rescue mission." - Cortana

"The enemy has captured Captain Keyes, and are holding him aboard one of their cruisers, the Truth and Reconciliation. The ship is currently holding position approximately three hundred meters above the other end of this plateau." - Cortana
"So how do we get inside the ship if it's in the air? The Corps issued me a rifle, not wings." - ODST #1
"There's a gravity lift that ferries troops and supplies between the ship and the surface. That's our ticket in." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Once we get inside the ship, I should be able to lock on to the tracking signal from Captain Keyes' neural implants." - Cortana
"Hit it, Marines, go go go! The Corps ain't payin' us by the hour!" - Staff Sergeant Parker

"Stick to the higher ground on the right. We should be able to recon the Covenant position without being spotted. I'm detecting Covenant Stationary Guns near the next pass. I recommend using your Sniper Rifle to take out the gunners while I call for Marine support." - Cortana

"Get ready to move in to support us, Sergeant. The Master Chief is going to covertly take out as many of the Covenant as he can. Don't open fire until you hear the enemy return fire on us. That should let us keep the element of surprise." - Cortana
"Let 'em have it!" - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Alert! A Covenant is making a run for that stationary gun. Take him out!" - Cortana
"Hey, we did it! We're right behind you, Chief!" - ODST #1
"Stop. Motion tracker shows movement around the next bend." - Cortana
"We're ready to advance as soon as you call for us, Cortana." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Covenant forces detected up ahead. The path up on the left should let us sneak up around them." - Cortana
"We'll hang back while you get into position, Chief." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Cortana to Fire Team Charlie. The Chief has the left flank covered. Recommend you move up the middle." - Cortana
"Cortana to Fire Team Charlie. The Chief has secured the middle. Get ready to move up the left, you should be able to flank the enemy." - Cortana
"Roger that." - ODST #1
"Alert! Covenant dropships are inbound!" - Cortana
"We're directly under the ship now." - Cortana
"Good work, Marines." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Alright! Are we bad or what?" - ODST #1
"Mother of God...I'd never thought I'd get close to one of these things. How the hell are we suppose to get inside that monster?" - ODST #2
"If we're gonna board that thing, we need a plan." - ODST #2
"The Covenant use a Gravity Lift to ferry troops and supplies between the ship and the surface. We need to ambush them at the Grav Lift's loading zone, and use the lift to enter the ship." - Cortana
"Oh, is that all! That's us, the few, the proud, the expendable." - ODST #2
"Cortana to Echo 419, requesting reinforcements from our position." - Cortana
"Roger, Cortana, Echo 419 on approach." - Carol Rawley
"Crap, those stationary guns are gonna tear us to pieces!" - ODST #1
"Sir, those freakin' guns have us pinned down!" - ODST #2
"Alert! Covenant Dropships are inbound!" - Cortana
"Man, there's always something..." - ODST #1
"Contact, enemy in sight!" - ODST #1
"Covenant forces sighted! Let's hit 'em, Charlie Team!" - Staff Sergeant Parker
"We've secured the area. Let's square away the grav lift. Marines! Prepare for boarding action." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"This area's clear. No hostiles present. Marines, secure the grav lift and prepare for boarding!" - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Yes, sir!" - ODSTs
"Once we're inside the ship, I can home in on the Captain's command-neural interface. He'll probably be in or near the ship's brig, which should narrow our search." - Cortana
"Cortana to Echo 419. We've reached the Gravity Lift and are ready for reinforcements." - Cortana
"Copy that, Cortana. Hang tight, gentlemen. Foe Hammer out." - Carol Rawley
"Echo 419 inbound, clear the drop zone." - Carol Rawley
"Whoa!" - ODST #1
"Yee-haw!" - ODST #3
"We're in. I've got a good lock on the Captain's CNI transponder. No Covenant defenses detected." - Cortana
"What, there's no Covenant here? Maybe nobody's home..." - ODST #1
"Contacts! Lots of contacts!" - ODST #2
"No Covenant! Ya had to open your mouth!" - ODST #3
"Area secure, sir. We'd better keep moving. How about that door?" - ODST #2
"The door's locked, sir. I can't bypass it. We can't get through here." - ODST #2
"The door's locked, sir. No way through." - ODST #3
"We can use the side passages to find a way around." - Cortana
"We'd be sitting ducks in that narrow space. We can hold this position if you can find your way around and open the door from the other side, Chief." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"Chief, let's see if we can find a way to open this door." - Cortana
"Wait. That's the locked door down there. The Marines are waiting on the other side. The controls to open it must be somewhere in this room." - Cortana
"All clear, sir!" - ODST #3
"We should get moving." - Cortana
"Alright, everybody stay cool. Yell if you see anything." - ODST #1
"Cortana to Echo 419, requesting reinforcements at our position." - Cortana
"Foe Hammer here, Cortana... I read you, but you're inside the Covenant ship. I'm not sure I can —" - Carol Rawley
"Lock onto my signal and approach fast and low. There's a shuttle bay on the ship's starboard side." - Cortana
"Roger, Cortana - Echo 419 on approach." - Carol Rawley
"Hey, which way should we go now? All the doors on this level are locked!" - ODST #3
"Wait a moment. I'm going to access the Covenant Battlenet and locate an override code to open a door." - Cortana
"You'd better hurry Cortana, we can't hold them off all day." - ODST #2
"Working on it. I'd like to see you crack a 128,000-bit modulating encryption key." - Cortana
"Got it. The door is open. Everyone should move through now. I can't guarantee that it won't lock again when it closes." - Cortana
"I'm going to call for reinforcements. There's no sense going in with anything less than full strength." - Cortana
"Cortana to Foe Hammer. We need additional support troops. We're going to open the shuttle bay door again. Move in and drop off reserve troops on my signal." - Cortana
"I copy, Cortana. Echo 419 standing by for your signal." - Carol Rawley
"Cortana to Echo 419. The shuttle bay door is open. You can start your approach." - Cortana
"Roger. Echo 419 inbound." - Carol Rawley
"This looks like the ship's command center. The Captain's transponder signal is strong, he must be close." - Cortana
"This is a good spot, Chief. We'll mind the store here while you go find the Captain. Good luck, sir." - ODST #1
"This looks like a good spot. We'll mind the store here while you go after the Captain. Good luck." - Staff Sergeant Parker
"We must be in the brig. These look like holding cells. There are probably multiple detention stations. The Captain must be in one of them. We need to keep looking for him." - Cortana
"It's the Chief!" - Marine POW #1
"Chief! Chief! Let me out, man!" - Marine POW #2
"Watch out Chief, the Covenant guards are using some sort of stealth armor." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Good work, Chief." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"That was amazing, sir, you really kicked the shi—" - Marine POW #3
"Stow it, Corporal! Chief, open these cells, and let's get the hell out of here. The power control's along the back wall." - Captain Keyes
"Coming here was reckless. You two know better than this...Thanks." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Marines! Lock and load your weapons, let's be ready to move." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Okay, Sir." - Marine POW #1
"Yes, Sir." - Marine POW #2
"While the Covenant had us locked up in here, I overheard the guards talking about this ring world. They call it... 'Halo'." - Captain Jacob Keyes

"One moment, sir. Accessing the Covenant Battlenet. According to the data in their networks, the ring has some kind of deep religious significance. If I'm analyzing this correctly, they believe that 'Halo' is some kind of weapon. One with vast, unimaginable power." - Cortana
"Then it's true... The Covenant kept saying that whoever controls Halo controls the fate of the universe." - Captain Jacob Keyes

"Now I see... I have intercepted a number of messages about a Covenant search team, scouting for a 'control room'. I thought they were looking for the bridge of a cruiser that I damaged during the battle above the ring. But they must be looking for Halo's control room." - Cortana

"That's bad news. If Halo is a weapon, and the Covenant gain control of it, they'll use it against us and wipe out the entire human race. Chief, Cortana. I have a new mission for you. We need to beat the Covenant to Halo's control room. Marines! Let's move!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Yes, Sir." - Marine POW #1
"Okay, Sir." - Marine POW #2
"Chief, you have the point." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"We should head back to the shuttle bay and call for evac." - Cortana
"No! Without the Captain... the Covenant have already won..." - Cortana
"No! We lost the Captain..." - Cortana
"We made it!" - Cortana
"Cortana to Echo 419 - We have the Captain and need extraction on the double." - Cortana
"Negative, Cortana. I've been engaged by Covenant air patrols, and I'm havin' a tough time shakin' 'em. You'll be better off findin' your own ride... sorry." - Carol Rawley
"Acknowledged, Foe Hammer. Cortana out." - Cortana
"Air support is cut off, Captain. We need to hold here until she can move in." - Cortana
"Aw, man! We're trapped in here! We're screwed! We're screwed, man!" - Marine POW #1
"Oh great! Now we're trapped here. We're screwed!" - Marine POW #2
"Stow the bellyaching, soldier. Remember you're a leatherneck. Cortana, if you and the Chief can get us into one of those Covenant dropships, I can fly us outta here." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Yes, Captain. There's a Covenant dropship still docked." - Cortana
"That's it. The dropship is loose." - Cortana
"Everybody, mount up! Let's get onboard." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Give me a minute to interface with the ship's controls." - Cortana
"No, no need. I'll take this bird out myself." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Captain! Hunters!" - Cortana
"Hang on!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Nice one, sir!" - Marine POW #3
"Time for a little payback." - Captain Jacob Keyes

"The Covenant believe that what they call the 'Silent Cartographer' is somewhere under this island. The Cartographer is a map room that will lead us to Halo's control center. The island has multiple structures and installations. One of them contains the map room." - Cortana
"We're approaching the LZ, it's gonna be hot! Get set to come out swingin'. Touchdown! Hit it, Marines!" - Carol Rawley
"Go, go, go!" - Gunnery Sergeant Waller
"Pile out people, let's move!" - Gunnery Sergeant Waller
"Pile out! Go, go, go!" - Marine #1
"Area's secure. All hostiles have been eliminated." - Marine #1
"Area's secure." - Cortana
"Affirmative. Echo 419 inbound. Somebody order a Warthog?" - Carol Rawley
"Hey, I didn't know you made house calls, Foehammer!" - Marine #2
"Music to my ears, Foehammer!" - Marine #1
"You know our motto: We Deliver." - Carol Rawley
"Okay, let's move out. Let's go find the map room that will show us the location of Halo's control center." - Cortana
"There, in the cliff wall; I'll bet the Silent Cartographer is somewhere inside that facility." - Cortana
"They're already inside! We need to get in there quick, before they discover the location of Halo's control center!" - Cortana
"Anyone else see what I see? How are we supposed to get around that, huh?" - Marine
"The Covenant are putting up a real fight! The Cartographer must be here. My analysis indicates that the map room should be at the bottom floor of this facility. Let's keep going inside." - Cortana
"Don't let them lock the doors!" - Cortana
"Interesting... I underestimated the Covenant's understanding of Halo's subsystems. They've locked the doors, and we don't have enough firepower to get through them." - Cortana
"Cortana to Keyes." - Cortana
"Go ahead, Cortana. Have you found the control center?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Negative, Captain. The Covenant have impeded our progress. We can't proceed unless we can disable this installation's security system." - Cortana

"Understood. We're still en route to the objective. I may be out of contact when we get there. Here are your orders. I want you to use any means necessary to force your way into the facility and find Halo's control center. We have to get to the center before the Covenant, and failure, people, is not an option." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Echo 419 to ground teams. I'll stay on station and keep an eye out for Covenant bogies." - Carol Rawley
"Second squad, ready to roll! Soon as everybody's topside!" - Gunnery Sergeant Waller
"LZ looks secure, Sir, nothing moving." - Marine #3
"Good luck, people. Keyes out." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"We need to find the security override to get this door open." - Cortana
"Well, there's the entrance to the security substation, but it looks like we'll have to look for another way up." - Cortana
"It looks like there is a path leading to the interior of the island." - Cortana
"Use the holo-panel to shut down the security system." - Cortana

"This isn't the map room. Analyzing... This is a security override station for the main facility, located somewhere else on this island. Shut the system down so the Covenant won't be able to lock us out." - Cortana
"Good. That should open the door that leads into the main shaft." - Cortana
"Mayday, mayday! Dropship Bravo 022 taking enemy fire! Repeat! We are under heavy fire and are losing altitude!" - Bravo 022 Pilot
"Understood. We're on our way." - Cortana

"Chief, Bravo 022 was bringing us some heavy weapons. After I saw we were up against Hunters, I thought you could use them. Let's move down the beach. Keep an eye out for any cargo we can salvage." - Cortana
"Foehammer to ground teams, you got two enemy dropships coming in fast!" - Carol Rawley
"Dammit! Okay, people, we got company comin', let's set the table. Engage enemy forces on sight!" - Gunnery Sergeant Waller
"It'll be easier to hold them off from inside the structure. Can you get inside?" - Cortana
"Negative! They're closin' in too fast, negative! Chief! You gotta find the Cartographer! We'll keep 'em busy as long as we can!" - Gunnery Sergeant Waller
"Give 'em hell, Marine." - Cortana
"We'll be in a tight spot if we don't get out of here before additional reinforcements arrive. Let's find that map." - Cortana
"There. That holo-panel should activate the map." - Cortana

"Analyzing... Halo's control center is located there. That structure appears to be some sort of temple or shrine, if I've interpreted this correctly. Interesting. A shrine is an unlikely place to put such a significant installation." - Cortana
"Cortana to Captain Keyes." - Cortana
"The Captain has dropped out of contact, Cortana. His ship may be out of range or having equipment problems." - Carol Rawley

"Keep trying. Let me know when you've reestablished contact, and then tell him that the Master Chief and I have determined the location of the control center. We'll be heading there as soon as we're topside." - Cortana
"Affirmative. Foehammer out." - Carol Rawley
"Cortana to Echo 419. The Chief and I are topside, requesting pickup." - Cortana
"Roger. On my way." - Carol Rawley
"Let's get moving. Foehammer. Here are coordinates and a flight plan I've worked up." - Cortana
"Uh, Cortana - these coordinates are underground!" - Carol Rawley
"The Covenant did a thorough seismic scan. My analysis shows that Halo is honeycombed with deep tunnels - which circle the whole ring." - Cortana
"I hope your analysis is on-the-money, Cortana. This Pelican won't turn on a dime." - Carol Rawley
"Look on the bright side, Foehammer. The last thing the Covenant will expect is an aerial insertion...from underground." - Cortana
"This is as far as I can go!" - Carol Rawley
"Roger that. We can find our way to the Control Center from here." - Cortana
"Good luck. Foehammer out." - Carol Rawley
"The Covenant presence here is stronger than I anticipated. They seem to have the entire region secured." - Cortana

"Interesting... the weather patterns here seem natural, not artificial. I wonder if the ring's environment systems are malfunctioning... or if the designers wanted the installation to have inclement weather." - Cortana
"This is Fire Team Zulu requesting immediate assistance from any UNSC forces. Does anyone copy? Over." - Fireteam Zulu Sergeant
"I didn't think there were any human forces left on this part of the ring." - Cortana
"Cortana to Fire Team Zulu, I read you. Fire Team Zulu, this is Cortana. Hold position. We're on our way." - Cortana
"Roger that. Make it quick." - Fireteam Zulu Sergeant
"Glad you could join the party, sir!" - Marine #1
"Master Chief, Sir! Good to see you!" - Marine #2
"They gave it their best shot, but they didn't count on running into the biggest squad of Marine bad-asses in the Corps!" - Marine #1
"That's all of them. The area's secure." - Marine #2
"Enemy forces eliminated. The area's secure." - Marine #1

"That's the last of 'em - area secure. Stand down, team! They did their damnedest, that's for sure. This is all that's left of my platoon! The Covenant are down here in force... and they brought plenty of toys! I wouldn't have given us a snowball's chance until you showed up, Chief." - Fireteam Zulu Sergeant
"Aw, crap. Let's get the hell outta here, man! Somebody call the dropship!" - Marine #3
"You stow that garbage right now, mister. You're a Marine, so act like it, dammit! We've got a job to do here." - Fireteam Zulu Sergeant
"Shut up! Show some backbone, amigo. We're all in this together!" - Marine #2
"Negative, team. No evac available at this time. But the Chief and I could use some assistance." - Cortana
"Okay, Marines. Time to pay back the Chief for pulling your sorry tails out of the fire. Prepare to move out!" - Fireteam Zulu Sergeant
"Enemy mortar tanks sighted at my position... it's gonna be a busy day." - Marine #1
"Dang, they got armor support! Watch out for those tanks!" - Marine #2
"Bloody hell! Enemy forces have armor support... It's time to earn our pay." - Marine #3
"Contact, contact! Covenant mortar tanks are moving in!" - Marine #4
"The Covenant placed their tanks to defend the entrance to the tunnel." - Cortana
"Looks like that armor wasn't so tough after all! Let's mop up the rest of 'em!" - Marine #1
"More Covenant sighted! Man, these guys are like cockroaches!" - Marine #1
"Contact, more Covenant sighted!" - Marine #2
"Aw man, more Covenant!" - Marine #3
"More Covenant!" - Marine #4
"You monkeys almost look like golden boys!" - Fireteam Zulu Sergeant
"Damn straight!" - Marine
"I thought the Covenant had eliminated all the Marine forces in this area." - Cortana
"Hey, Anybody else hear that? Aw, man... Covenant dropship inbound, take cover!" - Marine #1
"Look sharp, boys! Covenant dropship inbound, let's move!" - Marine Sergeant
"Quiet... Anybody hear something? Covenant! Covenant dropship inbound!" - Marine #4
"The Covenant are dropping in behind us! We're trapped!" - Marine #3
"Master Chief, the Covenant have stationary guns dug up in those rocks!" - Marine #2
"Whoa, sir! The Covenant are dug up in those rocks! They've got us pinned down here!" - Marine #3
"Covenant Forces are diggin' in those rocks sir, we can't move." - Marine #4
"We need to get up this ridge." - Cortana
"Marines, hold your positions. We'll handle those guns." - Cortana
"Master Chief, we should scale the ridge and get below those stationary guns." - Cortana
"Roger that. Marines, stay here and cover the Master Chief." - Marine #2
"I'm in no hurry for a heroic charge on those guns, Cortana. Holding position." - Marine #3
"Holding position. Everybody, keep your eyes peeled and cover the Master Chief." - Marine #4
"Cortana to Fire Team Zulu. I've sent a distress signal tagged with your current position. Hold your position and await evac. The Master Chief and I are going to continue on ahead." - Cortana
"That's affirmative! Fire Team Zulu out!" - Marine #1
"Affirmative! Okay people, evac bird's on the way!" - Marine #2
"Give 'em hell, sir! Fire Team Zulu out!" - Marine #3
"Roger, good luck." - Marine #4
"Resistance appears to be increasing. We must be close to the Control Center." - Cortana
"Analyzing. This must be the control room. Subtle. The entrance to the Control Room is at the top of that pyramid structure. Bring me up there and I should be able to get us inside." - Cortana
"The entrance to the control room is at the top of the pyramid. Let's get up there. We should commandeer one of those Ghosts, we're going to need the firepower." - Cortana
"Scanning... Covenant forces in the vicinity have been eliminated. Let's move on to Halo's Control Room." - Cortana
"This is it. Halo's control center." - Cortana
"That terminal, try there." - Cortana
"You all right?" - John-117
"Never been better! You can't imagine the wealth of information. The knowledge! So much! So fast! It's glorious!" - Cortana
"So, what sort of weapon is it?" - John-117
"What are you talking about?" - Cortana
"Let's stay focused. Halo... how do we use it against the Covenant?" - John-117

"This ring isn't a cudgel, you barbarian, it's something else... something much more important. The Covenant were right... this ring... it's Forerunner. Give me a second to access... yes, the Forerunner built this place, what they called a 'fortress world', in order to... no, that can't be. Oh, those Covenant fools, they must have known, there must have been signs!" - Cortana
"Slow down. You're losing me." - John-117
"The Covenant found something, buried in this ring, something horrible, and now... they're afraid." - Cortana
"Something buried? Where?" - John-117
"The Captain, we've got to stop the Captain!" - Cortana
"Keyes? What do we-" - John-117
"The weapons cache he's looking for. It's not really- We can't let him get inside!" - Cortana
"I don't understan-" - John-117
"There's no time. Get out of here, find Keyes, stop him! Before it's too late!" - Cortana
"The last transmission from the Captain's dropship was from this area. That was over twelve hours ago." - Carol Rawley
"When you locate Captain Keyes, radio in, and I'll come pick you up." - Carol Rawley

"Dropship Victor 933-(static)-Pillar of Autumn-(static)-need assistance. We are under att-(static)-attack by some new kind of hostile-(static)-isn't Covenant. (Static) Captain Keyes has been captured by hostiles. (static) -dug in at a large structure in a swamp-(static)-We need to pull out. Please-(static)-I will set this message to repeat at-(static)-regular intervals. Dropship Victor 933, clear." - Dropship Victor 933's Pilot (Recording)
"Stay back! Stay back, you're not turning me into one of those things! I'll blow your brains out! Get away from me!" - Paranoid Marine
"Gaaaaahh! Aaaaaahh! Don't touch me, you freaks! I won't be like you, I'll die first! Find your own hiding place, the monsters are everywhere!" - Paranoid Marine
"Play dead! That's what I did...played dead. They took the live ones... Oh God, I can still hear them!" - Paranoid Marine
"Monsters... Ahhhhhh! Ahhhhaaahhh..." - Paranoid Marine
"Just leave me alone!" - Paranoid Marine
"Sarge? Mendoza? Bisenti? Oh God...the things took them. Away, away, away, they went away... They're gone! Get it? Gone!" - Paranoid Marine
"They won't get me! Oh God... Oh God, I don't want to be like them. Please, please no, nooo..." - Paranoid Marine
"Why do we always have to listen to this old stuff, Sarge?" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Watch your mouth, son. This 'stuff' is your history. It should remind you grunts what we're fightin' to protect." - Avery Johnson
"Hey... if the Covenant wanna wipe out this particular part of my history, that's fine by me." - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Yeah... better it than us." - Private Bisenti
"You ask 'em real nice next time you see 'em, Bisenti. I'm sure they'll be happy to oblige." - Avery Johnson
"LZ looks clear! I'm bringing us down!" - Pelican dropship pilot
"Go, go, go!" - Avery Johnson
"Stay close, Jenkins!" - Avery Johnson
"Mendoza! Move it up!" - Avery Johnson
"Wait here for the Captain and his squad, then get your ass inside." - Avery Johnson
"Sir!" - Private Wallace A. Jenkins
"Okay, let's move!" - Avery Johnson
"--which is weird, right? I mean...look at it." - Private Kappus
"Something...scrambled the insides." - Private Kappus
"What's that? Plasma scoring?" - Avery Johnson
"Yeah... I dunno. Maybe there was an accident. You know, friendly fire or something?" - Private Kappus
"What do we have here, Sergeant?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Looks like a Covenant patrol. Badass Elite units, all KIA." - Avery Johnson
"Real pretty... Friend of yours?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Nah, we just met." - Private Kappus
"Right. Well, let's get this door open." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"I'll try, sir... But it looks like these Covenant worked pretty hard to lock it down." - Private Kappus
"Just do it, son!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Yes, sir." - Private Kappus
"I've got a bad feeling about this..." - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Boy, you always got a bad feelin' about something-" - Avery Johnson
"-Captain, Sarge (static) can you hear me?!" - Corporal Lovik
"What's going on, soldier?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"We've got contacts - lots of 'em - but...they're not Covenant... They're just tearing through us - what the?! Oh, nooooo...!" - Corporal Lovik
"Corporal? Do you copy, over?" - Avery Johnson
"Mendoza, get your ass back up to Second Squad's position, and find out what the hell is goin' on." - Avery Johnson
"But sir-" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"I don't have time for your lip, soldier! I gave you an order!" - Avery Johnson
"Sarge! Listen!" - Private Kappus
"What is that?" - Private Wallace A. Jenkins
"Where's that coming from, Mendoza?" - Avery Johnson
"Everywhere... I don't - there! ¡Mira!" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Ahh...augh! Get it out! Get it out- augh!" - Private Riley
"Hold still, hold still!" - Private Bisenti
"Let 'em have it!" - Avery Johnson
"Sergeant, we're surrounded!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"God dammit, Jenkins! Fire your weapon!" - Avery Johnson
"There are too many, Sarge!" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Don't even think about it, Marine!" - Avery Johnson
"Yo, this is loco!" - Private Manuel Mendoza
"Get back here, Marine! That's an order!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Jenkins!" - Avery Johnson
"This is Echo 419. Chief, is that you? I lost your signal when you disappeared inside the structure. What's going on down there? I'm tracking movement all over the place!" - Carol Rawley

"Sir! Thank God you're here. We've been lost out here for hours. After we lost contact with the rest of the mission, we, we headed for the RV point, and then these-these....these things...they ambushed us. We've gotta get out of here!" - Chips Dubbo
"There's a large tower a few hundred meters from your current position. Find a way above the fog and foliage canopy and I can move in and pick you up." - Flight Captain Carol Rawley
"Greetings. I am the Monitor of Installation 04. I am 343 Guilty Spark." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Someone has released the Flood. My function is to prevent it from leaving this installation. But I require your assistance. Come. This way." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Chief, I've lost your signal! Where'd you go? Chief? Chief!" - Carol Rawley
"We must collect the Index before we can activate the installation." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Doodeedooodooo..." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Teeheeeheeeheeehee!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Huaaaaa, huaaaauuuuhummmmm." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Ahhhh...I, am a genius. Heeheeheehee!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Hum hum huuuuum, hum hum hum." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Ah." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh. Hello." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Hahahahaha!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh. That's a good idea." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Reclaimer, we must keep moving...! Reclaimer?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh, how unfortunate." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Ah, a pity." - 343 Guilty Spark
"I told you to upgrade to at least a class 12 Combat Skin!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please, stop being human." - 343 Guilty Spark
"That is completely unnecessary." - 343 Guilty Spark
"We have much more important business here." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please control your temper." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Are you finished yet?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please conserve your ammo." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please stop firing your weapon." - 343 Guilty Spark
"We are near the Index chamber. Follow me." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The energy field above us contains the Index. We must get up there." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The security doors have sealed automatically. I will go access the override to open them." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please, follow closely. This portal is the first of ten." - 343 Guilty Spark
"That is not the correct direction, Reclaimer. If you do not follow me, you may become lost." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Puzzling. You brought such ineffective weapons to combat the Flood, despite the containment protocols." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Flood must not escape the installation. They consume all." - 343 Guilty Spark

"You can see how the body has been transformed by the genetic restructuring of the Flood infection. The small creatures carry spores that cause a host to mutate. The mutated host then produces spores that can pass the Flood to others. It is insidious and elegant. As long as any hosts remain, the Flood is virulent." - 343 Guilty Spark
"We must continue. This way please." - 343 Guilty Spark
"This installation's research facilities are most impressive! Perhaps we'll have time to see them later." - 343 Guilty Spark

"These Sentinels will supplement your combat system. But I suggest you upgrade to at least a Class Twelve combat skin. Your current model only scans as a Class Two, which is ill-suited for this kind of work." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Pardon me. A plasma conduit breach in Section 5-5-2-4 has disrupted power flow to a gravity maintenance assembly. Repairs require my attention. I will return soon." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Flood activity has caused a failure in a drone control subsystem. I must reset the backup unit. Please, continue on. I will rejoin you when I have completed my task." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Sentinels can use their weapons to manage the Flood only for a short time. Speed is of the essence." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please wait here." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Your environment suit should serve you well when the Flood begins to alter the atmosphere. You are a good planner." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The installation was well conceived. It is surely the only way to end the Flood threat." - 343 Guilty Spark

"I would conjecture that the other species currently on the installation is responsible for releasing the Flood. They seem most persistent in their attempts to access restricted areas." - 343 Guilty Spark

"Why naturally the Flood is simply too dangerous to release, and mass sterilization protocols may again need to be enacted. Of course, samples were kept here after the last catastrophic outbreak... for study. It seems... that decision may have been an error." - 343 Guilty Spark

"The installation was specifically built to study and contain the Flood. Their survival as a race was dependent upon it. I am grateful to see that some of them survived to reproduce." - 343 Guilty Spark
"I will deactivate the security lock. Wait here." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please stay close. Time is short." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Flood are already hard at work repairing your vessel. Its parasitic nature belies the Flood's intelligence." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The energy barrier surrounding the Index will deactivate when we reach the ground floor." - 343 Guilty Spark
"You may now retrieve the Index." - 343 Guilty Spark

"Protocol requires that I take possession of the Index for transport. Your organic form renders you... vulnerable to infection. The Index must not fall into the hands of the Flood, before we reach the Control Room and activate the installation." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Flood is spreading! We must hurry!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"...which means that any organism of sufficient mass and cognitive capability is a potential vector." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Is something wrong?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"No... Nothing." - John-117
"Splendid. Shall we?" - 343 Guilty Spark

"Unfortunately, my usefulness to this particular endeavor has come to an end. Protocol does not allow units with my classification to... perform a task as important as the reunification of the Index with the Core. That final step is reserved for you, Reclaimer." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Odd. That wasn't supposed to happen." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh, really!?" - Cortana
"Cortana!" - John-117
"I've spent the last 12 hours cooped up in here, watching you toady about, helping that thing get set to slit our throats!" - Cortana
"Hold on now, he's a friend." - John-117
"Oh! I didn't realize. He's your pal, is he? Your chum? Do you have any idea what that bastard almost made you do?!" - Cortana
"Yes... Activate Halo's defenses and destroy the Flood, which is why we brought the Index to the Control Center." - John-117
"You mean this?" - Cortana
"A construct? In the Core?! That is absolutely unacceptable!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Sod off!" - Cortana
"What impertinence! I shall purge you at once!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"You sure that's a good idea?" - Cortana
"How... how... how dare you?! I'll-" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Do what? I have the Index! You can just float and sputter!" - Cortana
"Enough!" - John-117
"The Flood is spreading. If we activate Halo's defenses, we can wipe them out." - John-117

"You have no idea how this ring works, do you? Why the Forerunners built it? Halo doesn't kill Flood, it kills their food. Humans, Covenant, whatever. We're all equally edible! The only way to stop the Flood is to starve them to death. And that's exactly what Halo is designed to do: Wipe the galaxy clean of all sentient life. You don't believe me? Ask him!" - Cortana
"Is it true?" - John-117

"More or less. Technically, this installation's pulse has a maximum effective radius of twenty-five thousand light years. But, once the others follow suit, this galaxy will be quite devoid of life, or at least any life with sufficient biomass to sustain the Flood. But you already knew that... I mean, how couldn't you?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Left out that little detail, did he?" - Cortana
"We have followed outbreak containment procedure to the letter. You were with me each step of the way, as we managed this crisis." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Chief, I'm picking up movement!" - Cortana
"Why would you hesitate to do what you have already done?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"We need to go, right now." - Cortana
"Last time, you asked me, if it were my choice, would I do it? Having had considerable time to ponder your query, my answer has not changed." - 343 Guilty Spark
"There is no choice. We must activate the ring." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Get - us - out - of - here!" - Cortana
"If you are unwilling to help, I will simply find another. Still, I must have the Index. Give your construct to me, or I will be forced to take her from you." - 343 Guilty Spark
"That's not going to happen." - John-117
"So be it. Save his head. Dispose of the rest." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Look out!" - Cortana

"We can't let the Monitor activate Halo. We have to stop him - we have to destroy Halo. According to my analysis of the available data, I believe the best course of action is somewhat... risky. An explosion of sufficient size will help destabilize the ring, and will cut through a number of primary systems. We need to trigger a detonation on a large scale, however. A starship's fusion reactors going critical would do the job. I'm going to search what's left of the Covenant battlenet, and see if I can locate the Pillar of Autumn's crash site. If the ship's fusion reactors are still relatively intact, we can use them to destroy Halo." - Cortana

"I haven't located the crash site yet but we need to buy some time, in case the Monitor or his Sentinels find a way to activate Halo's final weapon, without the Index. The machinery in these canyons are Halo's primary firing mechanisms. They consist of three phase pulse generators that amplify Halo's signal, and allow it to fire deep into space. The power levels are enormous. I can't even begin to calculate the pulse's range. So, if we damage or destroy these generators, the Monitor will need to repair them before Halo can be used. That should buy us some time. I'm marking the location of the nearest pulse generator with a nav point. We need to move in and neutralize the device." - Cortana
"Wait. We should commandeer one of those Banshees; we'll need it to reach the pulse generator in time." - Cortana
"Good, let's get moving. The nav point marks our target." - Cortana

"That's the pulse generator. The center core is the signal amplifier. That's what we need to shut down. We need to interrupt the pulse generator's energy stream. I've adjusted your shield system so that it will deliver an EMP burst to disrupt the generator, but you'll need to walk into the beam to trigger it. The EMP blast should neutralize the generator. But it will also drain your shields and leave you vulnerable until they recharge." - Cortana
"Objective accomplished! The pulse generator has overloaded. Scanning... the generator's central core is offline. Well done." - Cortana
"The second pulse generator is located in the adjacent canyon. Move out, and I'll mark the target with a nav point when we get closer." - Cortana
"Head through that door. That's the way to the next canyon." - Cortana
"OK. Let's take care of the next pulse generator." - Cortana
"Wait! We haven't destroyed the pulse generator yet. Find a Banshee, and fly it up to the location marked by the nav point." - Cortana
"That did it! The pulse generator overloaded. One more to go." - Cortana

"I've located the Pillar of Autumn. She put down twelve-hundred kilometers up spin. Energy readings show her fusion reactors are still powered up. The systems on the Pillar of Autumn have fail safes that even I can't override, without authorization from the Captain. We'll need to find him or his neural implants, to start the fusion core detonation. One target remaining. Let's take care of the final pulse generator." - Cortana
"That tunnel leads to the next section of the canyon. The final pulse generator we need to destroy is through there." - Cortana
"Final target neutralized. Let's get out of here." - Cortana
"Let's find a ride and get to the Captain." - John-117
"No, that'll take too long." - Cortana
"You have a better idea?" - John-117

"There's a teleportation grid that runs throughout Halo. That's how the Monitor moves about so quickly. I learned how to tap into the grid when I was in the Control Center. Unfortunately, each jump requires a rather...consequential expenditure of energy." - Cortana
"Something tells me I'm not gonna like this." - John-117
"But I'm pretty sure I can take the needed energy from your suit without permanently damaging your shields. Needless to say, I think we should only try this once." - Cortana
"Do it." - John-117

"The Covenant network is in absolute chaos! From what I've been able to piece together, their leadership ordered all ships to abandon Halo when they found the Flood, but they were too late. The Flood overwhelmed this cruiser and disabled it. The Covenant are terrified the Flood will repair the ship and use it to escape from Halo. They've sent in a strike team to neutralize the Flood and repair the ship for immediate departure. I've got a good lock on Captain Keyes' CNI transponder signal! He's alive! And the implants are intact! There's some interference from the cruiser's damaged reactor. I'll bring us in as close as I can." - Cortana
"Ohh... I see, the coordinate data needs to be— " - Cortana
"Right. Sorry." - Cortana
"Chief... Don't be a fool. Leave me..." - Captain Jacob Keyes
"Captain? Captain?! I've lost him..." - Cortana
"The damage caused by the crash and the Flood have sealed off all nearby access ways to the control room. We should find another way in." - Cortana

"Analyzing damage... This hole was caused by some kind of explosive. Very powerful if it tore through a ship's hull. All I detect down there are pools of coolant. We should continue our search somewhere else." - Cortana
"Warning! Threat level increasing!" - Cortana
"That jump into the coolant is looking better all the time, Chief!" - Cortana
"Trust me! It's deep enough to cushion our fall!" - Cortana
"Chief, we need to jump now!" - Cortana
"Let's get out of here, and find another way back aboard the ship." - Cortana
"We should head this way, towards the ship's gravity lift." - Cortana
"The crash did more damage than I suspected. Analyzing. Coolant leakage rate is significant. The ship's reactor should already have gone critical." - Cortana
"Power source detected. There's the gravity lift. It's still operational! That's our way back in!" - Cortana
"We should be able to get into the ship's control room from here." - Cortana
"The Covenant Battlenet is a mess. I can't access the ship's schematics. My records indicate that a shuttle bay should be... here." - Cortana
"Look, in the corners. The Flood are gathering bodies here." - Cortana
"Looks like another shuttle bay. We should be able to reach the control room from the third level." - Cortana
"I... gave you an order, soldier! Now pull out!" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"He's delirious! In pain! We have to find him!" - Cortana
"The control room should be... this way." - Cortana
"The Captain! His vitals are fading! Please, Chief, hurry!" - Cortana
"No human life-signs detected. The Captain! He's...one of them!" - Cortana
"We can't let the Flood get off this ring! You know what he'd expect- What he'd want us to do." - Cortana
"It's done, I have the code. We should go." - Cortana
"We need to get back to the Pillar of Autumn. Let's go back to the shuttle bay and find a ride." - Cortana
"Perfect. Grab one of the escort Banshees, and we'll use it to return to the Pillar of Autumn." - Cortana
"This thing is falling apart!" - Cortana
"It'll hold." - John-117
"We're not gonna make it!" - Cortana
"We'll make it." - John-117
"Pull up! Pull up!" - Cortana
"You did that on purpose, didn't you?" - Cortana

"We need to get to the bridge. From there, we can use the Captain's neural implants to initiate an overload of the ship's fusion engines. The explosion should damage enough systems below it to destroy the ring." - Cortana
"The bridge. We made it. Let's get to work." - Cortana
"I need you to upload me into the control systems. The terminal is located next to the main view screen." - Cortana
"I leave home for a few days, and look what happens. This won't take long." - Cortana
"There. That should give us enough time to make it to a lifeboat and put some distance between ourselves and Halo before the detonation." - Cortana
"I'm afraid that's out of the question, really." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh, hell!" - Cortana
"Ridiculous! That you would imbue a warship's AI with such a wealth of knowledge! Weren't you worried it might be captured? Or destroyed?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"He's in my data arrays, a local tap!" - Cortana
"You can't imagine how exciting this is! To have a record of all of our lost time! Human history, is it? Fascinating." - 343 Guilty Spark

"Oh, how I will enjoy every moment of its categorization! And to think that you would destroy this installation, as well as this record... I am shocked. Almost too shocked for words." - 343 Guilty Spark
"He stopped the self-destruct sequence..." - Cortana
"Why do you continue to fight us, Reclaimer? You cannot win! Give us the construct, and I will endeavor to make your death relatively painless, and -" - 343 Guilty Spark
"At least I still have control over the comm channels." - Cortana
"Where is he?" - John-117

"I'm detecting taps throughout the ship - Sentinels, most likely. As for the Monitor... He's in Engineering. He must be trying to take the core offline! Even if I could get the countdown restarted... I don't know what to do." - Cortana
"How much firepower would you need to crack one of the engine's shields?" - John-117
"Not much. A well-placed grenade perhaps, but why-" - Cortana
"Okay, I'm coming with you." - Cortana
"Chief! Sentinels!" - Cortana
"The ship was heavily damaged when it crashed. Head to the cryo chamber. We should be able to get to the engine room through there." - Cortana
"Engine room located. We're here." - Cortana

"Alert! The Monitor has disabled all command access. We can't restart the countdown. The only remaining option is to detonate the ship's fusion reactors. That should do enough damage to destroy Halo. Don't worry; I have access to all of the reactor schematics and procedures. I'll walk you through it. First, we need to pull back the exhaust couplings. That will expose a shaft that leads to the primary fusion drive core." - Cortana
"You would destroy this installation, as well as this fascinating record?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Do you require medical attention?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Your behavior is not in accordance with established protocols." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Oh, how touching." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Detaching the fail-safe just now?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Please. Surrender the construct and I will endeavor to make the necessary repairs as quickly as possible." - 343 Guilty Spark
"The Flood continue to multiply, Reclaimer!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Why do you continue to ignore your task?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Are you perhaps ill?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Why do you continue to resist us, Reclaimer?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Inconsistent!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Inadequate safeguards." - 343 Guilty Spark
"This AI construct possesses far too much data." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Weren't you worried it might be compromised?" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Unacceptable, Reclaimer!" - 343 Guilty Spark
"Not acceptable, Reclaimer. You must surrender the construct, so that we may return to our appointed task." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Your behavior necessitates repair and revision." - 343 Guilty Spark
"Surrender the construct to me, or I will be forced to take you offline permanently." - 343 Guilty Spark

"Good, step one complete! We have a straight shot into the fusion reactor! We need a catalyst explosion to destabilize the magnetic containment field surrounding the fusion cells. Use an explosive. I recommend a grenade or a rocket. If you run out of explosives, there is an armory station located near the engine room's entrance." - Cortana
"Analyzing. Fusion reactor number one destabilizing. Use explosives on the other three reactors. That should be enough to trigger a wildcat explosion of the engines." - Cortana
"Keep it up! Only one more fusion reactor to go!" - Cortana

"That did it! The engine's gone critical! Based on the current rate of decay, we should have fifteen minutes to get off the ship; we don't have much time! We should move outside and signal for evac. Accessing schematics... There's a service lift at the top of the engine room! It leads to a Class Seven service corridor that runs along the ship's dorsal structure. Hurry!" - Cortana
"Cortana to Echo 419: come in, Echo 419!" - Cortana
"Roger, Cortana. I read you, 5 by 5." - Carol Rawley

"The Pillar of Autumn's engines are going critical, Foe Hammer! Request immediate extraction! Approach the crash site and be ready to pick us up at external access Junction 4C as soon as you get my signal!" - Cortana
"Affirmative. Echo 419 going on station." - Carol Rawley
"Echo 419 to Cortana. Things are gettin' noisy down there. Everything okay?" - Carol Rawley
"Negative, negative! We have a wildcat destabilization of the ship's fusion drive core. The engines must have sustained more damage than we thought!" - Cortana
"Analyzing... We have six/five minutes before the fusion drives detonate. We need to evac, now!" - Cortana
"Activating final countdown timer. When it reaches zero, the engines will detonate. The explosion will generate a temperature of almost 100 million degrees. Don't be here when it blows." - Cortana
"We can't make it on foot, we need a vehicle!" - Cortana
"Alert: we need to keep moving! Get back in the Warthog." - Cortana
"Cortana to Echo 419! Request extraction now, on the double!" - Cortana
"Affirmative, Cortana. Foe Hammer inbound." - Carol Rawley
"Wait, stop! This is where Foe Hammer is coming to pick us up. Hold position here." - Cortana
"Cortana to Echo 419! Two Covenant Banshees are approaching on your six! Evade! Say again, evade!" - Cortana
"I'm hit! Mayday! Mayday! Airfoil structures have been shot to hell! I can't hold her! I can't hold her!" - Carol Rawley
"Echo 419!" - Cortana
"She's gone... Calculating alternate escape route." - Cortana
"The ship's inventory shows one Longsword fighter still docked in Launch Bay 7. If we move now, we can make it!" - Cortana
"Ugh... Good thing that food nipple's waiting for me at the starship, cause man; have I worked up a big - grunty - thirst!" - Thirsty Grunt
"Chief, up ahead there's a gap in the trench. At top speed, we should be able to clear it!" - Cortana
"That's the ship! Move! We need to get aboard, now!" - Cortana
"We're cutting it close!" - Cortana
"Here we go." - John-117
"C'mere you motherf-! I'm gonna... Grrr... ah." - Avery Johnson
"Oh, shi..." - Avery Johnson
"This is it, baby. Hold me." - Avery Johnson
"...mmf." - Hugging Elite
"Shut them down, we'll need them later." - Cortana
"Fancy a look?" - Cortana
"Did anyone else make it?" - John-117
"Scanning. Just...dust and echoes. We're all that's left." - Cortana
"We did what we had to do...for Earth. An entire Covenant armada obliterated, and the Flood... We had no choice. Halo...it's finished." - Cortana
"No... I think we're just getting started." - John-117
